Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Text Ruling

The matter was argued and submitted. Counsel for the Plaintiff to submit doucments claimed as privileged by 8/11/06; 12 noon for in camera review.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Cross-Deft Adam Gruen, To Compel Production Of Documents At Deposition, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Jordana Boag, for Defendant Kenney & Markowitz, LLP
Ruling:
No other appearance. Hearing held. Defendants Kenney and Markowitz, LLP's Motion to Compel Deposition, Production of Documents, and for Sanctions, granted in part, denied in part with modifications:
1. Motion to compel deposition of Adam Gruen, Esq. granted; within 10 days of this order, the parties shall agree on a date for the taking of the deposition;
2. Request for production of documents at deposition granted in part, denied in part, as follows:
a. Request for production nos. 1 and 2, granted; however, document production shall be limited to those items referencing or pertaining to Alameda Superior Court Action nos. 252528 and/or 824480;
b. Request for production nos. 3 and 4, hearing required.
c. Request for production no. 5, granted; provided that in lieu of producing copies of checks, the deponent may produce other records of payment received from Max Schoenfeld;
d. Request for production nos. 6,7, and 8, Granted.
3. Request for sanctions DENIED.
MODIFICATIONS;
1. Within 14 days of this order.
B) Request for Production of Documents - hearing cont'd to Aug.7,2006 @ 10:30 AM
D) Request for Production Nos. 6,7,8,9, and 10 - GRANTED.
3. Request for Sanctions-cont'd for hearing on 8/7/06, 10:30 AM. COMM: PAUL SLAVIT

Jordana Boag, for Defendant/Opposing party
